title: [Stormbrow, Abandoned Mine Dock]
description: The river rushes by a wide granite ledge jutting out from a small stone dock, here in the damp, dark chill of Stormbrow's depths.  Yellow-green moss, glowing with some unearthly light, covers the walls and edges toward a stout iron gate, just visible among the shadows.

wayto.2260: ;e unless move 'go ferryboat'; echo 'Waiting for ferryboat...'; waitfor 'The squat ferryboat arrives at the dock with a hollow thunk.'; move 'go ferryboat'; end
